name: io.github.ridget/supernote-mcp
title: Supernote
description: Capture the screen, read/render notes, and upload files on a Ratta Supernote from an AI agent.

environmentVariables.name: SUPERNOTE_IP
environmentVariables.description: Device IP (optionally with :port) from the Supernote mirroring popup. Optional — if unset, the server scans the LAN for the mirror.

environmentVariables.name: SUPERNOTE_DISCOVER
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 to disable the LAN-scan fallback used when SUPERNOTE_IP is unset or unreachable.
